children.text: Sunday Update Expect a 30% chance of showers/storms both today and Monday as a weak system lifts to our north.   High temperatures will reach the upper 70s and lower 80s.  The rain chance increases to 50% Wednesday as yet another cold front slides across the Midlands. Monday:  Variably cloudy, high 81, 30% showers/storms. Tuesday:  Mostly cloudy, high 82, 50% showers/storms. Wednesday-Thursday:  Partly cloudy, highs from 75º-82º.   Meteorologist Ben Tanner
